commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who shall secretly bring in destructive heresies, even denying the Lord that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift destruction. Sectas introducere, doxas, as this Greek word sometimes signifies; witness Aristotle, 4. , where he puts as apposite, kata doxan, kai kat aletheian. In conviviis, agapais, which reading Dr. Wells prefers before apatais, the common reading: in the Protestant translation, with their own deceivings.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who shall secretly bring in destructive heresies, even denying the Lord that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift destruction. Lying teachers among you, some of which were already come, and many more were to follow, who shall bring in sects, (heresies) leading to perdition, and deny the Lord who bought them, denying the divinity of Jesus Christ, our Redeemer; such were the disciples of Simon, and many after them. (Witham) Sects of perdition; that is, heresies destructive of salvation. (Challoner).

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: And there shall be false teachers among you, who privily shall bring in damnable heresies."

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Sects of perdition: That is, heresies destructive of salvation.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Neither ought their existence to surprise us, for it was foretold that they should come to pass;

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
